title: Verify accepting the Incentive Offer
description: Test that a user can successfully accept the discount offer, which should set up a discounted first month payment after the trial ends.
preconditions: The Incentive Offer pop-up is displayed

steps.description: 1. Click the primary action button to 'Grab Offer'
2. Complete the payment flow for the specified amount (e.g., ₹XX)

expected_result: Payment is successful. The user's trial remains active. The pop-up closes. The user's account is flagged for a discounted first month.
